## @jgengine/assets

- `AssetAlias` (interface): interface AssetAlias тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `AssetDownload` (type): type AssetDownload = PinnedDownload | ScrapeDownload тАФ тЪа undocumented

- `AssetMatch` (type): type AssetMatch = | { kind: "model"; id: string; source: string; file?: string; via: "index" | "alias" | "single" } | { kind: "pack"; source: string; title: string; categories: readonly string[] } | { kind: "material"; id: string; title: string; categories: readonly string[] } | { kind: "component";тАж тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `AssetProvider` (type): type AssetProvider = | "kenney" | "quaternius" | "kaykit" | "polypizza" | "itch" | "ambientcg" | "gameicons" | "custom" тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `AssetSource` (interface): interface AssetSource тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `AssetSourceKind` (type): type AssetSourceKind = "model" | "material" | "sprite" тАФ What a source's archive contains: GLB models (default), one PBR material's texture maps, or a pack of individual 2D sprite/icon files (SVG/PNG).
- `BuildCatalogOptions` (interface): interface BuildCatalogOptions тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `BuildMaterialCatalogOptions` (interface): interface BuildMaterialCatalogOptions тАФ Options for `buildMaterialCatalog`.
- `BuildSpriteCatalogOptions` (interface): interface BuildSpriteCatalogOptions тАФ Options for `buildSpriteCatalog`.
- `ExtractedMaterialMap` (interface): interface ExtractedMaterialMap тАФ One normalized map pulled out of a material archive by `extractMaterialMaps`.
- `ExtractedSpriteFile` (interface): interface ExtractedSpriteFile тАФ One SVG/PNG file pulled out of a sprite/icon-pack archive by `extractSpriteFiles`.
- `FindOptions` (interface): interface FindOptions тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `IndexEntry` (interface): interface IndexEntry тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `MATERIAL_MAP_FILES` (const): const MATERIAL_MAP_FILES: { readonly color: "color.jpg"; readonly normal: "normal.jpg"; readonly roughness: "roughness.jpg"; readonly ao: "ao.jpg"; readonly displacement: "displacement.jpg"; } тАФ Normalized filenames a pulled material directory contains, keyed by map role.
- `MaterialCatalog` (interface): interface MaterialCatalog тАФ Resolves material ids and `material/тАж` aliases to `MaterialRef`s.
- `MaterialMapRole` (type): type MaterialMapRole = keyof typeof MATERIAL_MAP_FILES тАФ One PBR map's role within a material: color, normal, roughness, ao, or displacement.
- `MaterialMaps` (interface): interface MaterialMaps тАФ URLs of one material's PBR maps; `ao`/`displacement` files may be absent from a rare pack.
- `MaterialRef` (interface): interface MaterialRef тАФ A resolved material: identity, attribution, and its normalized map URLs.
- `ModelDims` (interface): interface ModelDims тАФ Measured horizontal footprint, footprint center, and lowest Y of a model in model space.
- `ModelSnippetOptions` (interface): interface ModelSnippetOptions тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `PinnedDownload` (interface): interface PinnedDownload тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `RankedMatch` (interface): interface RankedMatch тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `RegistryCatalog` (interface): interface RegistryCatalog тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `RegistryComponent` (interface): interface RegistryComponent тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ReindexSpritesResult` (interface): interface ReindexSpritesResult тАФ Per-source and total counts returned by `reindexSprites`.
- `ScrapeDownload` (interface): interface ScrapeDownload тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `SingleAsset` (interface): interface SingleAsset тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `VerifyResult` (interface): interface VerifyResult тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `aliases` (const): const aliases: readonly AssetAlias[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ambientcgSources` (const): const ambientcgSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ Every ambientCG material source, generated per family (`ambientcg-grass001` тАж ).
- `buildCatalog` (function): function buildCatalog(options: BuildCatalogOptions = {}): AssetCatalog тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `buildMaterialCatalog` (function): function buildMaterialCatalog(options: BuildMaterialCatalogOptions = {}): MaterialCatalog тАФ A resolvable catalog over every `kind: "material"` source. Ids are source ids (`ambientcg-grass001`) plus the `material/тАж` aliases; every resolve returns the normalized map URLs under `basePath`, matching what `assets pull` writes into `<dir>/materials/<id>/`.
- `buildSpriteCatalog` (function): function buildSpriteCatalog(options: BuildSpriteCatalogOptions = {}): AssetCatalog тАФ Resolves individual pulled sprite/icon ids (e.g. `gameicons-icons/sword`) to `{ url }`.
- `componentInstallUrl` (function): function componentInstallUrl(name: string): string тАФ The `shadcn add` URL for a HUD component, e.g. `https://jgengine.com/r/vital-bar.json`.
- `componentWiringSnippet` (function): function componentWiringSnippet(component: RegistryComponent): string тАФ Copy-paste wiring for a HUD component: the `shadcn add` command plus import + usage.
- `createStarterCatalog` (function): function createStarterCatalog(options: BuildCatalogOptions = {}): AssetCatalog<ModelAssetRef> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `entryForSpriteFile` (function): function entryForSpriteFile(source: AssetSource, file: string): IndexEntry тАФ Builds one sprite/icon `IndexEntry` тАФ same shape as a model entry, minus `dims`.
- `entryUrl` (function): function entryUrl(basePath: string, entry: IndexEntry): string тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `extractMaterialMaps` (function): function extractMaterialMaps(archive: Uint8Array): ExtractedMaterialMap[] тАФ Pulls the recognized PBR maps out of a material archive (ambientCG's flat `<Asset>_<Res>_<Map>.jpg` layout) and normalizes their names so resolved URLs never depend on the provider's naming or the pulled resolution.
- `extractSpriteFiles` (function): function extractSpriteFiles(archive: Uint8Array): ExtractedSpriteFile[] тАФ Pulls every SVG/PNG out of a sprite/icon-pack archive, deduped by basename regardless of nesting depth.
- `findAssets` (function): function findAssets(query: string, options: FindOptions = {}): AssetMatch[] тАФ The ranked matches for a query тАФ models, packs, HUD components, and icons in one list.
- `gameiconsSources` (const): const gameiconsSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ game-icons.net (https://game-icons.net) тАФ ~4,000 CC BY 3.0 SVG item/ability icons from 40+ contributing artists, mirrored as one GitHub repo (github.com/game-icons/icons). `HEAD` resolves the default branch without pinning a name or commit, so this always mirrors the current set; the per-artist `license.txt` files inside the repo carry the individual credits behind this pack's single collective `author` field.
- `generatedBySource` (const): const generatedBySource: Record<string, IndexEntry[]> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `generatedIndex` (const): const generatedIndex: IndexEntry[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `generatedSpriteBySource` (const): const generatedSpriteBySource: Record<string, IndexEntry[]> тАФ Pulled sprite/icon entries grouped by source id.
- `generatedSpriteIndex` (const): const generatedSpriteIndex: IndexEntry[] тАФ Every pulled sprite/icon entry across all sources, flattened.
- `iconWiringSnippet` (function): function iconWiringSnippet(name: string): string тАФ Copy-paste wiring for a HUD glyph from the registry `game-icon` catalog.
- `indexSpriteSourceDir` (function): function indexSpriteSourceDir(source: AssetSource, dir: string): IndexEntry[] тАФ Walks a pulled sprite-pack directory and returns one `IndexEntry` per SVG/PNG, deduped by filename.
- `isScrapeDownload` (function): function isScrapeDownload(download: AssetDownload): download is ScrapeDownload тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `kaykitSources` (const): const kaykitSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `kenneySources` (const): const kenneySources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `kenneySpriteSources` (const): const kenneySpriteSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ Kenney's CC0 2D icon/UI packs тАФ `kind: "sprite"` counterpart of `kenneySources`.
- `keyFromSpriteFile` (function): function keyFromSpriteFile(file: string): string тАФ Strips the `.svg`/`.png` extension off a pulled sprite/icon filename to get its id suffix.
- `materialAliases` (const): const materialAliases: readonly AssetAlias[] тАФ Semantic keys onto the ambientCG catalog, mirroring the model alias layer.
- `materialSources` (const): const materialSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ Every `kind: "material"` source тАФ one CC0 PBR material each, resolvable via `buildMaterialCatalog`.
- `materialWiringSnippet` (function): function materialWiringSnippet(id: string, basePath = "/materials"): string тАФ Copy-paste wiring for a pulled PBR material: resolve the map URLs through the material catalog, then apply them onto terrain or a model.
- `modelSources` (const): const modelSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ Every source whose archive holds GLB models (Kenney, Quaternius, KayKit packs).
- `modelWiringSnippet` (function): function modelWiringSnippet(id: string, options: ModelSnippetOptions = {}): string тАФ Copy-paste wiring for a pulled GLB id: resolve through the catalog, drop into a model seam.
- `quaterniusSources` (const): const quaterniusSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `rankAssets` (function): function rankAssets(query: string, options: FindOptions = {}): RankedMatch[] тАФ Rank every catalog entry тАФ models, packs, HUD components, icons тАФ against one query.
- `readGlbDims` (function): function readGlbDims(bytes: Uint8Array): ModelDims | null тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `registryCatalog` (const): const registryCatalog: RegistryCatalog тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `reindexSprites` (function): function reindexSprites(spritesDir: string, outDir: string): ReindexSpritesResult тАФ Same shape as `reindex` (models) but walks SVG/PNG files and skips dims measurement тАФ sprites have no footprint.
- `singles` (const): const singles: readonly SingleAsset[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `sourceById` (const): const sourceById: ReadonlyMap<string, AssetSource> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `sources` (const): const sources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `spriteSources` (const): const spriteSources: readonly AssetSource[] тАФ Every `kind: "sprite"` source тАФ a pack of individual 2D icon/UI files, resolvable via `buildSpriteCatalog`.
- `spriteWiringSnippet` (function): function spriteWiringSnippet(id: string, basePath = "/sprites"): string тАФ Copy-paste wiring for a pulled sprite/icon-pack file: resolve through the sprite catalog.
- `verifyManifest` (function): function verifyManifest(): VerifyResult тАФ тЪа undocumented

## @jgengine/assets/cli/pull

- `cliFetch` (const): const cliFetch: typeof fetch тАФ The runtime's own fetch, with a curl fallback for hosts it cannot reach тАФ some proxied sandboxes tear down bun's TLS stream to GitHub's release-asset host while curl (which honors SSL_CERT_FILE) gets through fine.

- `generatedSpritesDir` (const): const generatedSpritesDir: string тАФ Sprite-pack counterpart of `generatedDir`.
- `isPopulated` (function): function isPopulated(dir: string): boolean тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `resolveGeneratedDir` (function): function resolveGeneratedDir(cliDir: string): string тАФ Sibling of `cli/` under `src/` (dev) or `dist/` (published) so reindex writes the tree consumers import.

## @jgengine/assets/download

- `DEFAULT_RELEASE_BASE` (const): const DEFAULT_RELEASE_BASE: "https://github.com/Noisemaker111/jgengine/releases/download/packs" тАФ Default asset mirror: this repo's own GitHub Releases, reachable from every cloud sandbox without network-policy changes (github.com is on the default allowlist). Assets live on the rolling `packs` release, one flat zip per pack named `<provider>-<packId>.zip`, kept in sync with the source catalog by `.github/workflows/mirror-assets.yml` тАФ adding a catalog entry is the whole publishing step. Override the chain with `--mirror` / `JGENGINE_ASSETS_MIRROR`, or disable this hop with `JGENGINE_ASSETS_NO_DEFAULT_MIRROR=1`.
- `DownloadPackOptions` (interface): interface DownloadPackOptions тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `DownloadPackResult` (interface): interface DownloadPackResult тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ExtractedGlb` (interface): interface ExtractedGlb тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ExtractedSpriteFile` (interface): interface ExtractedSpriteFile тАФ One SVG/PNG file pulled out of a sprite/icon-pack archive by `extractSpriteFiles`.
- `ExtractedTexture` (interface): interface ExtractedTexture тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `FetchLike` (type): type FetchLike = typeof fetch тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `defaultReleaseUrl` (function): function defaultReleaseUrl(source: AssetSource): string тАФ URL of `source`'s archive on the default GitHub-release mirror.
- `downloadArchive` (function): function downloadArchive(url: string, fetchImpl: FetchLike = fetch): Promise<Uint8Array> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `downloadPackArchive` (function): function downloadPackArchive(source: AssetSource, options: DownloadPackOptions = {}): Promise<DownloadPackResult> тАФ Resolves and downloads a pack's archive, trying sources in order until one succeeds: (1) the mirror base override at `mirrorOverrideUrl`, (2) the default GitHub-release mirror at `defaultReleaseUrl` (skipped when `JGENGINE_ASSETS_NO_DEFAULT_MIRROR=1`), (3) the primary provider path (`resolveArchiveUrl`: scrape or pinned URL), (4) the pack's own `mirror` URL. A pinned `sha256` is verified against whichever source supplied the bytes; a mismatch is treated as a failed attempt so the next source in the chain is tried. Throws with every attempted URL and its failure reason when all sources fail.
- `extractGlbs` (function): function extractGlbs(archive: Uint8Array): ExtractedGlb[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `extractSpriteFiles` (function): function extractSpriteFiles(archive: Uint8Array): ExtractedSpriteFile[] тАФ Pulls every SVG/PNG out of a sprite/icon-pack archive, deduped by basename regardless of nesting depth.
- `extractTextures` (function): function extractTextures(archive: Uint8Array): ExtractedTexture[] тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `findArchiveUrl` (function): function findArchiveUrl(html: string, pageUrl: string): string | null тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `mirrorOverrideUrl` (function): function mirrorOverrideUrl(baseUrl: string, source: AssetSource): string тАФ Layout for the `--mirror` / `JGENGINE_ASSETS_MIRROR` base URL override: the archive for a pack is expected at `<baseUrl>/<provider>/<packId>.zip`, e.g. `https://my-mirror.example.com/kenney/kenney-nature.zip`.
- `resolveArchiveUrl` (function): function resolveArchiveUrl(source: AssetSource, fetchImpl: FetchLike = fetch): Promise<string> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `sha256Hex` (function): function sha256Hex(bytes: Uint8Array): Promise<string> тАФ тЪа undocumented

## @jgengine/assets/spriteIndexGen

- `ReindexSpritesResult` (interface): interface ReindexSpritesResult тАФ Per-source and total counts returned by `reindexSprites`.
- `entryForSpriteFile` (function): function entryForSpriteFile(source: AssetSource, file: string): IndexEntry тАФ Builds one sprite/icon `IndexEntry` тАФ same shape as a model entry, minus `dims`.
- `indexSpriteSourceDir` (function): function indexSpriteSourceDir(source: AssetSource, dir: string): IndexEntry[] тАФ Walks a pulled sprite-pack directory and returns one `IndexEntry` per SVG/PNG, deduped by filename.
- `keyFromSpriteFile` (function): function keyFromSpriteFile(file: string): string тАФ Strips the `.svg`/`.png` extension off a pulled sprite/icon filename to get its id suffix.
- `reindexSprites` (function): function reindexSprites(spritesDir: string, outDir: string): ReindexSpritesResult тАФ Same shape as `reindex` (models) but walks SVG/PNG files and skips dims measurement тАФ sprites have no footprint.

- `VerifyResult` (interface): interface VerifyResult тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `verifyData` (function): function verifyData(input: VerifyInput): VerifyResult тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `verifyManifest` (function): function verifyManifest(): VerifyResult тАФ тЪа undocumented
